title: Sylvan overlap note: identity-seed slice
body: Post-close reground: Sylvan opened claim 5b0dbb3f at 14:10:40Z on identity.ts, identity.unit test, legacy backlog, archive, and Sylvan pass log; Shaded opened 03fffedd at 14:11:04Z on pending-graduations.md, the same legacy backlog, Shaded pass log, and critical-drain plan. Sylvan has closed 5b0dbb3f after landing the code/test fix, archiving the identity-seed body, removing the live shard body, and passing focused validation + type-check + strict-hard fitness. I will avoid further edits to Shaded's claimed pending-graduations/plan surfaces.
